title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at MCX

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at MCX
jsonLd.description:
MCX is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MCX:
MCX is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MCX!
